candidate_signal: Hostile beast/humanoid kills, murder/innocent checks, undead/Daedra/bandit categories
capture_pattern: Non-start-game-enabled receiver quest calls a mod router/event service
compatibility_note: Shares Event should be used; test receiver behavior per mod.

candidate_signal: Nonlethal violence, persecution, first-strike aggression, bounty-adjacent events
compatibility_note: Do not double-score with Kill Actor without cooldown.

candidate_signal: Reported crime, hold civic standing, Imperial/justice pressure
capture_pattern: Receiver adjusts reputation/state track, not deity piety directly

candidate_signal: Submission to law, civic punishment, prison path
compatibility_note: Use sparingly; arrest can be player inconvenience already.
Avoid punishing twice for same crime.
Could be farmed by petty crime unless capped.

candidate_signal: School-specific devotion signals, taboo magic, restoration, conjuration, necromancy
capture_pattern: Receiver classifies spell/keyword and routes curated events
compatibility_note: Raw casts are farmable; use cooldowns and meaningful thresholds.

candidate_signal: Smithing/labor, alchemy, enchanting, Bosmer plant taboo, offering creation
compatibility_note: Craft loops are farmable; use daily caps and value/quality thresholds.

candidate_signal: Milestone learning, magical study, martial discipline
compatibility_note: Do not award raw skill XP or every level.

candidate_signal: Nocturnal/Mephala success, civic penalty, theft discipline
capture_pattern: Receiver validates success, target, detection if possible
compatibility_note: Needs runtime proof of payload semantics.

candidate_signal: Pilgrimage, sacred places, wilderness sleep/travel, temple entry, city/hold transitions
compatibility_note: Location spam is possible; cap by place and day.

candidate_signal: Offerings, relic acquisition, Daedric artifacts, sacred texts

capture_pattern: Usually better as curated dialogue/quest signal
compatibility_note: Do not use for generic NPC clicks.
Verify exact event coverage for regular disease vs vampirism.

candidate_signal: Curated quest, dialogue, shrine, ritual, and faction-stage signals
capture_pattern: CK fragment or script sends explicit event

compatibility_note: Learning a word is not same as using a shout.

candidate_signal: Community standing, marriage, followers, charity, intimidation outcomes
compatibility_note: Use cautiously; relationship rank can change from many sources.
